name: Date Nut Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.
2. Add dates and nuts and toss until well-coated and separated. Set aside.
3. Beat egg yolks until thick (about 3 minutes).
4. Gradually beat in brown sugar and vanilla extract.
5. Blend in the date-nut mixture.
6. Beat egg whites until stiff; fold into batter.
7. Pour batter into a greased and floured 15 by 10 by 1 inch pan.
8. Spread evenly.
9. Bake at 325 degrees for 30 minutes until light brown.
10. Cool, then cut into 48 bars.
11. Roll in powdered sugar.
